sglang.title: MoE Expert Parallel Impl
sglang.author: xiaobochen123
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This is the implementation of MoE Expert Parallel, seamlessly integrated with TP. The expert parallel size (ep-size) matches the tensor parallel size (tp-size).
It supports the following formats:

[ -] FP16/BF16
[ -] FP8:Dynamic/Static

I used CUDA/CUTLASS to implement these operators. Ho

vllm.title: [Misc][LoRA] Clean up the function interface of Punica
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Description
The current Punica interfaces(functions whose names start with add_ in punica.py) are somewhat complex and disorganized. This PR primarily categorizes all LoRA layers into the following three types and  clean up related interfaces. The benefits  include simplifying and standardizing func

vllm.title: [Misc][Gaudi] Avoid torch.compile and enable lazy collectives by default for HPU lazy backend
vllm.author: kzawora-intel
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Similar to #10747, but applied specifically to PT HPU lazy backend. While PyTorch for Gaudi has torch.compile support, it currently needs to be enabled explicitly, and best performance is achieved with HPUGraphs instead. This patch disables torch.compile for PT lazy mode and HPUGraphs (HPU execution
